signal.raw_content:
FDA Form 483 — Inspectional Observations
Facility: WuXi AppTec (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. — STA Division
FEI: 3004862311
Inspection Dates: February 10-28, 2026
Inspectors: Chandra L. (Lead), Torres M.

OBSERVATION 1: Data integrity failure — 47 instances of deletion and re-creation of HPLC chromatographic data files were identified on the laboratory information management system (LIMS) over a 14-month period.

OBSERVATION 2: Your firm failed to investigate 12 out-of-specification (OOS) results for residual solvent content on Batch Nos. WX-SM-A-2024-089 through WX-SM-A-2024-091 (Starting Material A class intermediate).

OBSERVATION 3: Undocumented batch reprocessing without change control authorization was identified for three lots of protected amine intermediate.

OBSERVATION 4: Environmental monitoring data for ISO Class 7 synthesis suites (Buildings 5 and 7) showed exceedances that were not escalated to the quality unit for 8 of 12 months reviewed.

OBSERVATION 5: Stability samples for SM-A intermediate were found to have been stored outside validated temperature ranges for 72-hour periods on six occasions.

OBSERVATION 6-12: [See attached pages 4-11 for remaining observations covering equipment qualification, training records, and API release testing]

FIRM RESPONSE DEADLINE: Firm must respond to these observations within 15 business days. Failure to adequately respond may result in enforcement action including issuance of a Warning Letter or Import Alert.

This document is publicly released under FOIA. Confidential commercial information has been redacted.
